name: South American Potato Platter Jjgf65a
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Boneless, skinless chicken breast, diced
1/4 cup Fresh or canned mild peppers, diced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan or Dutch oven, combine the broth, potatoes, lemon halves, jalapeno peppers, and cumin.
2. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 8 minutes.
3. Add chicken; simmer about 7 more minutes until the potatoes are tender and chicken is cooked through.
4. Remove from heat and add the cilantro bunch.
5. Cool the potatoes and chicken in the broth for 30 minutes.
6. Meanwhile, make salsa by combining the remaining ingredients in a small bowl.
7. Drain the potatoes and chicken, reserving 1 cup of broth.
8. To assemble, mound the potatoes in the center of a large platter.
9. Shred the chicken and arrange it on the platter.
10. Pour half a cup of broth over the potatoes.
11. Serve the remaining salsa on the side.
12. Arrange accompaniments on the platter. Accompaniments can include:
- 3 hard cooked eggs, quartered
- 1 red bell pepper, julienned
- 1 cup pimento-stuffed green olives
- 6 whole green onions
- Crumbled feta cheese
- Raisins
- Peanuts
- Sour cream and tortilla chips
13. Serve immediately. Makes 4 to 6 servings.
